'''holataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:utilizational|utilizational]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:utilizational|utilizational]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| holataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || holatithi || holatiji || holatishi || holatiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || holatuthu || holatuju || holatushu || holatuku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || holatuthu || holatuju || holatushu || holatuku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || holatufthuf || holatufjuf || holatufshuf || holatufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || holatethe || holateje || holateshe || holateke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || holatotho || holatojo || holatosho || holatoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || holatotho || holatojo || holatosho || holatoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || holatofthof || holatofjof || holatofshof || holatofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || holatïfthïf || holatïfjïf || holatïfshïf || holatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || holatïfthïf || holatïfjïf || holatïfshïf || holatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || holatïfthïf || holatïfjïf || holatïfshïf || holatïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || holatïfthïf || holatïfjïf || holatïfshïf || holatïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || holatæthæ || holatæjæ || holatæshæ || holatækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || holatatha || holataja || holatasha || holataka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || holatatha || holataja || holatasha || holataka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || holatafthaf || holatafjaf || holatafshaf || holatafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || holatasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || holatshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || holatroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || holatmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || holatyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goholatnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goholatnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goholatnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goholatnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || holalatasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || holalatshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || holalatroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || holalatmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || holalatyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goholalatnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goholalatnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goholalatnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goholalatnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || helætasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || helætshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || helætroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || helætmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || helætyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gohelætnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gohelætnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gohelætnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gohelætnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || holfatasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || holfatshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || holfatroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || holfatmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || holfatyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || goholfatnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || goholfatnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || goholfatnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || goholfatnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
